data.title: Morgan Stanley buys Fremont facility for $110M in long-term lease with Western Digital; MSREI Head comments.
data.description: A significant acquisition was made by Morgan Stanley Investment Management in New York today, through funds managed by Morgan Stanley Real Estate Investing (MSREI). They acquired a premium advanced manufacturing property in Fremont, California for a noteworthy $110 million. This property is under a long-term net lease with Western Digital, a prominent player in the data storage and infrastructure solutions industry. Will Milam, the Head of U.S. Investments at Morgan Stanley Real Estate Investing, commented on the transaction, highlighting its importance.

data.title: Sensera Systems adds new features to SiteCloud Insights: site hygiene summaries, dumpster notifications, and Procore report exports for real-time project updates and safety.
data.description: Denver-based company Sensera Systems has announced the launch of upgraded features for its platform SiteCloud Insights. This tool now provides project teams with real-time, actionable summaries, alerts, and notifications regarding job sites. New functionalities include site hygiene summaries, dumpster notifications, and the capability to export reports to Procore. These enhancements aim to improve site safety and productivity for contractors while ensuring user-friendliness. The additions to SiteCloud Insights are part of the company's ongoing efforts to cater directly to the needs of project teams.

data.title: Procore Technologies acquires Datagrid to boost AI strategy, enhance data integration for customers in construction industry.
data.description: In Carpinteria, California, Procore Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: PCOR), a prominent global supplier of construction management software, has revealed its acquisition of Datagrid. This move brings together two robust AI solutions within the construction sector. Procore's AI strategy is set to receive a significant boost through this acquisition, providing customers with improved data connectivity. Datagrid, a top-tier vertical AI solution, effectively expands Procore's presence throughout the entire construction ecosystem.

data.title: Counterpart launches A&E Professional Liability coverage amid evolving risks in construction industry. #insurance #construction
data.description: A leading insurance platform, Counterpart, has unveiled a new Architects, Engineers, and Construction Professionals (A&E) Professional Liability offering in response to the evolving needs of industry experts dealing with larger, more intricate, and technology-driven projects. This specialized insurance aims to bridge the gaps left by traditional coverage that may not adequately protect professionals in the field. The tailored coverage is designed for both design and design-build projects, catering to the specific risks and challenges faced by professionals in this sector.

data.title: ExchangeRight hires Mollie Boyce as Senior VP of National Accounts to bolster Distribution team.
data.description: In Pasadena, California, ExchangeRight recently welcomed Mollie Boyce as the new senior vice president of national accounts, a move that bolsters the company's Distribution team. This addition is part of ExchangeRight's ongoing efforts to enhance its team and services.

data.title: Juniper Biomedical welcomes Frank Fischer to Board of Directors and wins Phase 3 of NIH SPARC Neuromod Prize.
data.description: In Worcester, Massachusetts, Juniper Biomedical has announced the addition of Neuropace founder Frank Fischer to their Board of Directors. Additionally, the company has achieved success by winning Phase 3 of the NIH SPARC Neuromod Prize. This achievement highlights Juniper Biomedical's innovative approach to neurotechnology and its impact on the industry.

data.title: Children's Hospital LA excels in pediatric liver transplants with best US survival rates for 2nd year; data from SRTR showed.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Children's Hospital Los Angeles (CHLA) has once again demonstrated its leading position in pediatric liver transplants, boasting the top one- and three-year patient survival rates in the United States. This achievement marks the second consecutive year that CHLA has secured this position, based on the latest data from the Scientific Registry of Transplant Recipients (SRTR) and the Organ Procurement and Transplantation Network (OPTN). Alongside these outstanding outcomes, CHLA also maintained its rank among the highest-performing hospitals nationwide in this field.

data.title: 1 in 4 Americans to cut charitable giving in 2026 per Church Mutual survey, despite improving economy.
data.description: In Merrill, Wisconsin, a recent national survey titled "2026 Charitable Giving in America" conducted by Church Mutual Insurance Company, S.I. has unveiled some noteworthy findings. Despite positive economic trends in 2026, a significant portion of Americans continue to exhibit financial caution. About 25% of adults express intentions to decrease their charitable donations citing persistent worries related to their personal finances and the overall economic landscape. This sentiment prevails despite recent improvements hinting at reduced inflation rates.

data.title: b2wise partners with Sundance Growth to bring DDMRP and AI-driven planning to N. America, accelerating global growth.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, b2wise, a prominent company specializing in DDMRP and AI-driven supply chain planning solutions, revealed a significant partnership with Sundance Growth, a growth-equity firm from MENLO PARK, California. This collaboration marks a crucial step for both entities as they aim to enhance their presence in the B2B software sector. The partnership between the two companies is expected to bring about innovative strategies and technologies to the market.

data.title: High costs of vet care impacting access, new study shows. 94% of vets note financial strain on clients, 56% say sometimes, 38% say often.
data.description: A recent study conducted by PetSmart Charities in collaboration with Gallup uncovered discrepancies between veterinarians and pet owners regarding flexible care options in light of financial constraints. The study, which was conducted in Washington and released on January 20, 2026, found that 94% of veterinarians believe that clients' financial concerns impact their decisions. Specifically, 56% of veterinarians mentioned that financial considerations sometimes influence pet care choices, while 38% stated that this happens frequently. These findings highlight the need for improved communication and understanding between pet owners and veterinarians as they navigate shared financial challenges.

data.title: Disclosure Facts received certification from the Validation Institute for its advertising risk infrastructure for consumer brands.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Disclosure Facts, a company specializing in advertising risk infrastructure for consumer brands looking to expand creator and influencer advertising, revealed its latest achievement. The company has officially obtained independent certification from the Validation Institute. This certification serves as validation of their expertise and credibility in the field. The certification showcases Disclosure Facts' commitment to ensuring transparency and reliability, reinforcing trust with clients. This milestone highlights the company's dedication to upholding industry standards.

data.title: Chicago attorney Furqan Mohammad honored as Super Lawyers Rising Star for 10th consecutive year, from 2016 to 2025.
data.description: Located in Elmwood Park, Illinois, on January 20, 2026, Furqan Mohammad has been honored as a Super Lawyers Rising Star for an impressive ten years straight, from 2016 to 2025. This recognition underscores his commitment to legal advocacy in the state, showcasing his consistent excellence in the field.

data.title: City of Newark named Digital Inclusion Trailblazer for 3rd year in a row by NDIA, efforts to close the digital divide recognized.
data.description: For three consecutive years, the City of Newark in New Jersey has been acknowledged by the National Digital Inclusion Alliance (NDIA) as a Digital Inclusion Trailblazer for the year 2025. This recognition highlights Newark's dedication to bridging the digital divide by providing greater access to technology and digital resources. This prestigious accolade solidifies Newark's position as a leader in promoting digital equity and inclusion within the community.

data.title: Publix Fort Lauderdale A1A Marathon & Half Marathon on Feb 15, 2026, in its 21st year, drawing thousands.
data.description: The 21st annual Publix Fort Lauderdale A1A Marathon & Half Marathon Presented by Colavita is set to take place on Sunday, February 15th in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. As one of South Florida's top running events, the race is expected to attract thousands of participants.

data.title: Air Canada named a top employer for young people in 2026 for the third year, offering diverse HR initiatives.
data.description: Air Canada has implemented various progressive human resources programs, such as providing language training and introducing a buddy system to support the integration of young professionals into the company. Additionally, they organize engagement events throughout the year to foster ongoing interaction among employees. These initiatives reflect the airline's commitment to enhancing its workforce and promoting a positive work environment.

data.title: D.R. Horton reports lower earnings and revenue but beats expectations with $594.8M net income and $6.887B revenue for Q1 2026 amid affordability challenges.
data.description: D.R. Horton, Inc. reported its fiscal 2026 first-quarter results, with lower year-over-year earnings and revenue, but exceeding analyst expectations. The company's net income was $594.8 million, or $2.03 per diluted share, compared to $844.9 million, or $2.61 per diluted share, in the prior year. Revenue was $6.887 billion, down from $7.613 billion. Consolidated pre-tax income was $798.1 million, with a profit margin of 11.6%. D.R. Horton is America's largest homebuilder by volume since 2002, based in Arlington, Texas. Sales surpassed expectations, exceeding the $6.603 billion consensus estimate. The company navigated affordability pressures and cautious consumer sentiment while returning significant capital to shareholders.

data.title: Citizens Financial Group (NYSE: CFG) to announce earnings on 2026-01-21. Analysts estimate EPS of $1.11. Positive guidance expected.
data.description: Citizens Financial Group (NYSE: CFG) is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Wednesday, January 21, 2026. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.11 for the company. Investors will be looking for signs that Citizens Financial Group has exceeded this estimate and are also eager for positive guidance on future growth. For more details, interested readers can find the complete article on Benzinga.com.
